name: /start shows the welcome and main menu

payload.text: 🔥 Welcome to EphemeralText — send encrypted, self-destructing messages. Use /help to get started.

name: main menu routes to New Message and back

payload.text:
📝 New ephemeral message

Send /upload to create an encrypted message that self-destructs after it is read.
🔥 Welcome to EphemeralText — send encrypted, self-destructing messages. Use /help to get started.

ℹ️ About EphemeralText

Messages are encrypted and shared via a one-time link. Each message self-destructs on first read or when its timer expires — nothing is kept afterwards.
